articles.title: Spot ETH ETFs clocks highest daily inflow day: ‘Alt rotation has begun’
articles.description: Spot Ether ETFs in the United States have hit a record high in daily inflows, surpassing spot Bitcoin ETFs inflows on the same day by around $2.9 million.
